name: @vaipakam/indexer
description: Vaipakam chain → archive D1 ingester Worker — indexer.vaipakam.com. Runs the cursor walk, decodes events (Offer / Loan / VPFI / Reward / NFT lifecycle), writes rows into the archive D1 database. Holds chain RPC credentials + archive D1 write credentials; doesn't sign chain transactions, doesn't serve frontend traffic. STUB — Stage 3 will populate from ops/hf-watcher/src/chainIndexer.ts + db.ts + dailyOracleSnapshot.ts.
